title: Oath to Roz Kolora
situation: The Shield Doncellas are formally organized as a disciplined armed unit under Roz Kolora's direct authority.
knows: Roz Kolora is their commanding authority
Their role is to serve as an armed, coordinated retinue
Discipline and obedience are core to unit identity
does_not_know: Any future strategic campaigns beyond current orders
Whether they will operate independently from Roz's command
